deck.share: Condividi la configurazione del mazzo extra

help.h1: Use the Extra Deck page to setup levels and ranks available.
help.h4: on your opponent's side of the field
help.h6: on your side of the field
help.h7: Add those numbers together. This is the total cards.
help.h8: The opponent has monsters on the field that are not Link monsters, with a rank/level in the data. This is the monster level to match.
help.h9: On the main screen of this app, you can see in every row:
help.h11: followed by a list of total cards
help.h12: If SEC resolves and at that moment:
help.h13: A monster with level to match is still on the field and
help.h14: the current total cards is still on the right side of that monster level to match
help.h15: then you can banish your opponent's entire field.
help.h16: If you click on the total cards button, you will see exactly what to send and what to return from the banish zone.
help.h17: If you activate a second SEC, the monsters to send and to return do not have to be the same.
help.h18: Use the Banished Monsters page to define the previously banished monsters.
